formulas.name: lengthofservice
formulas.expression: IF( YEAR(TODAY()) = YEAR(DATEVALUE({!Contact.First_Shift_Date_Time__c})), IF( MONTH(TODAY()) = MONTH(DATEVALUE({!Contact.First_Shift_Date_Time__c})), 0, (MONTH(TODAY()) - MONTH(DATEVALUE({!Contact.First_Shift_Date_Time__c}))) ), IF( TODAY() > DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), MONTH(DATEVALUE({!Contact.First_Shift_Date_Time__c})), DAY(DATEVALUE({!Contact.First_Shift_Date_Time__c}))), (YEAR(TODAY()) - YEAR(DATEVALUE({!Contact.First_Shift_Date_Time__c}))) * 12 + (MONTH(TODAY()) - MONTH(DATEVALUE({!Contact.First_Shift_Date_Time__c}))), (YEAR(TODAY()) - YEAR(DATEVALUE({!Contact.First_Shift_Date_Time__c}))) * 12 + (MONTH(TODAY()) - MONTH(DATEVALUE({!Contact.First_Shift_Date_Time__c}))) - 1 ) )

fields.name: Contact_Details_Text_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Thank you for taking the time to complete our {!ClientName} Inclusion and Belonging Survey. Your feedback is invaluable in helping us improve and create a more inclusive workplace for everyone.


We appreciate your participation and honest feedback.

fields.name: text
fields.fieldText: Sorry, you're no longer required to take this survey.

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText:
Oops...looks like something is not working quite right.


Details have been sent to system admin. In the meanwhile, try submitting this page again.

fields.name: Text_Question12_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Tell us about yourself

fields.name: Nine_0
fields.fieldText: Tell us how you feel about {!ClientName}

fields.name: Text_Question12_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Not far to go..

fields.name: Welcome_Text_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Alert!

This survey has now ended, please close this window.

textTemplates.name: Error_Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
Flow Error Message: 
{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

Run Time: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Survey ID: {!Get_Survey.Id}
